final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] D,
    output reg [7:0] Q,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK
);
    reg [7:0] cell_data; // 8-bit cell_data cell

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            cell_data <= D; // Write data to cell_data
        end
        Q <= cell_data; // Read data from cell_data
    end
endmodule
